title: Cheesy Crumble Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting casserole made with a flaky crumble topping and a rich, cheesy filling.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the grated cheese, crumble, chopped onion, and chopped parsley.
Transfer the mixture to a 20cm (8-inch) square baking dish.
Arrange the pitted olives on top of the cheese mixture.
Sprinkle a little extra crumble on top.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown and set.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
